name: Qonto
description: Qonto business finance platform for European companies

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Qonto
2. Go to Settings → Integrations
3. Copy your API key (format: login:secret_key)
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Qonto → Settings → Integrations → API Key (format: login:secret_key)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Qonto organization members to verify financial access
